Brazilian Cerrado disturbance and recovery pathways

Abstract

English abstract for the Wiley bilingual sample. It explains the sampling frame, the restoration objective, and the ecological gradient without repeating the body section headings.

A second English abstract paragraph keeps the sample long enough for section rendering and ensures the abstract remains separate from the article body in later classification.

Resumo

Resumo em portugues para o mesmo artigo. Ele deve permanecer como uma segunda secao de resumo e nao deve ser confundido com o corpo principal.

Um segundo paragrafo em portugues confirma que o extractor consegue manter duas variantes paralelas dentro da mesma area de abstract.

1 INTRODUCTION

The body section for this Wiley fixture is intentionally longer than a teaser paragraph. It describes the field design, the disturbance history, and the restoration context in enough detail to satisfy full-text availability checks.

A second body paragraph confirms that only the abstract area participates in multilingual preservation. The rest of the article should stay in its original section and should not be treated as parallel language content.
